flashcards.definition: log_b(x) = log(x)/log(b) = ln(x)/ln(b); converts any log to base 10 or base e.
Most calculators only have log (base 10) and ln (base e); other bases require conversion.
log_b(x) = log_a(x) / log_a(b) for any valid base a > 0, a ≠ 1.
To find log₃(7): type ln(7)/ln(3) or log(7)/log(3).
